lab.e10vocabularystylistics_added_to_the: Root word ke shuru mein lagta hai iske maani badalne ke liye (maslan,
Word ke aakhir mein lagta hai iski grammatical function ya maani badalne ke liye (maslan,
lab.e10vocabularystylistics_the_core_mea: Word ke core maani, aksar Latin ya Greek se liye gaye hain.
lab.e10vocabularystylistics_punctuation_: Punctuation reader ko guide karta hai aur text ki pacing ko prabhavit karta hai:
lab.e10vocabularystylistics_ends_a_decla: Declarative sentence khatam karta hai, ek firm stop qayam karta hai.
lab.e10vocabularystylistics_indicates_a_: Ek brief pause ko indicate karta hai, list mein items ko alag karta hai, ya clauses ko conjunction ke saath jorta hai.
lab.e10vocabularystylistics_links_two_re: Do related independent clauses ko bagair conjunction ke jorta hai, ideas ke darmiyan close relationship dikhata hai.
lab.e10vocabularystylistics_introduces_a: List, quotation ya explanation introduce karta hai, jo aage aane wali cheez ki taraf tawajah dilata hai.
lab.e11adjectivesadverbs_adjectives_desc: Adjectives nouns ya pronouns ko describe karte hain. Jab ek noun ko describe karne ke liye multiple adjectives istemal hote hain, to woh typically ek specific "royal" order follow karte hain.
lab.e11adjectivesadverbs_a_beautiful_opi: "A beautiful (opinion) small (size) old (age) round (shape) wooden (material) dining (purpose) table."
lab.e11adjectivesadverbs_adverbs_modify_: Adverbs verbs, adjectives ya doosre adverbs ko modify karte hain. Yeh aksar sawalon ke jawab dete hain jaise how, where, when, how much ya how often.
lab.e11adjectivesadverbs_when_multiple_a: Jab multiple adverbs ek hi verb ko modify karte hain, standard order usually yeh hota hai:
lab.e11adjectivesadverbs_no_words_added_: Abhi tak koi words add nahi hue
lab.e11adjectivesadverbs_what_is_the_sta: Sentence mein Adverbs ka standard order kya hai? (3-letter acronym use karein)
lab.e11adjectivesadverbs_tip_click_words: Tip: Sentence mein words par click karke unhe bank mein wapas bhejein.
lab.e11nounspronouns_or_a_noun_phrase_th: ya noun phrase ki jagah leta hai. Jis noun ki taraf pronoun ishara karta hai (aage ya peeche), usse kehte hain
lab.e11nounspronouns_understanding_the_l: Pronoun aur uske antecedent ke darmiyan link ko samajhna reading aur writing mein clarity ke liye bohot zaroori hai. Is link ko kehte hain
lab.e11nounspronouns_this_is_the_most_co: Yeh sab se common type hai. Pronoun us antecedent ki taraf ishara karta hai jo text mein pehle mention ho chuka hai.
lab.e11nounspronouns_crown_here_her_refe: crown." Yahan "her" "queen" ki taraf ishara karta hai.
lab.e11nounspronouns_the_noun_it_refers_: us noun ke aata hai jiska yeh ishara karta hai. Yeh aksar dramatic effect ke liye ya complex sentence structures mein istemal hota hai.
lab.e11nounspronouns_fought_the_dragon_h: fought the dragon." Yahan "he" "king" ki taraf aage ishara karta hai.
lab.e11nounspronouns_a_pronoun_must_agre: Pronoun ko apne antecedent se teen tareeqon mein agree karna chahiye:
lab.e11nounspronouns_singular_antecedent: Singular antecedents ko singular pronouns chahiye (maslan he, she, it). Plural antecedents ko plural pronouns chahiye (maslan they, them).
lab.e11nounspronouns_masculine_feminine_: Masculine, feminine ya neuter pronouns ko antecedent ke saath sahi tarah match karna chahiye.
lab.e11nounspronouns_first_person_i_we_s: First person (I, we), second person (you), ya third person (he, she, it, they).
lab.e11nounspronouns_when_a_sentence_con: Jab sentence mein multiple nouns hote hain, to yeh unclear ho sakta hai ke pronoun kis ki jagah leta hai.
lab.e11nounspronouns_john_told_mark_that: "John told Mark that he had won the prize." (Kaun jeeta? John ya Mark?)
lab.e11nounspronouns_in_this_interactive: Is interactive lab mein, aap ka task hai pronouns ko unke antecedents ke saath map karna, different complexity waale sentences mein.
lab.e11nounspronouns_first_click_on_a_hi: Pehle, ek highlighted par click karein
lab.e11nounspronouns_next_locate_and_cli: Agla, uske corresponding ko dhundhein aur click karein
lab.e11nounspronouns_use_the_check_links: Controls panel mein "Check Links" button istemal karein taake apni accuracy ka jaiza lein.
lab.e11nounspronouns_no_links_recorded_y: Abhi tak koi links record nahi hui
lab.e11nounspronouns_in_complexity_3_the: Complexity 3 mein, pronoun "he" apne antecedent "king" se pehle aata hai. Is type of reference ko kya kehte hain?
lab.e11phrasesclauses_is_a_group_of_word: alfaz ka woh group hai jisme subject aur verb dono hote hain.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_can_stand_alone_as: Apne aap poora sentence ke taur par khara ho sakta hai.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_cannot_stand_alone: Apne aap khara nahi ho sakta aur subordinating conjunction ya relative pronoun se shuru hota hai.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_functions_as_a_nou: Sentence mein noun ki tarah kaam karta hai.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_modifies_a_noun_or: Noun ya pronoun ko modify karta hai.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_functions_as_an_ad: Adverb ki tarah kaam karta hai, verbs, adjectives ya doosre adverbs ko modify karta hai.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_is_a_group_of_rela: related words ka group hai jo
lab.e11phrasesclauses_contain_both_a_sub: rakhta dono subject aur verb. Yeh ek single part of speech ki tarah kaam karta hai.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_begins_with_a_prep: Preposition se shuru hota hai aur noun ya pronoun object par khatam hota hai.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_select_a_syntactic: Neeche ek syntactic category chunein, phir Simulation Stage mein corresponding chunks par click karein taake unhe highlight karein.
lab.e11phrasesclauses_apply_your_selecte: Highlighted chunks ko classify karne ke liye apne selected syntactic tools lagayein.
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_a_prepos: Preposition ek word ya words ka group hai jo noun, pronoun ya noun phrase se pehle istemal hota hai taake direction, time, place, location, spatial relationships dikhaye ya object introduce kare.
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_indicate: Batata hai ke event kab hota hai. Misaal:
Batata hai ke koi cheez kahan maujood hai. Misaal:
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_shows_mo: Kisi destination ki taraf movement dikhata hai. Misaal: travel
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_two_or_m: Do ya zyada words jo preposition ki tarah kaam karein. Misaal:
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_a_conjun: Conjunction clauses, sentences ya words ko jorta hai ek hi clause mein. Yeh different ideas ke darmiyan relationship dikhane ke liye zaroori hain.
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_join_par: Sentence ke grammatically equal parts ko jorte hain. Acronym FANBOYS yaad rakhein (For, And, Nor, But, Or, Yet, So).
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_join_a_d: Dependent clause ko independent clause se jorte hain, time, reason ya condition ka relationship qayam karte hain.
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_work_in_: Joron mein kaam karte hain words ya phrases ko jorne ke liye jo barabar ki importance rakhte hain.
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_an_inter: Interjection ek word ya phrase hai jo strong emotion ya sudden feeling ko zahir karta hai. Yeh akela khara ho sakta hai ya sentence se pehle aata hai, aksar exclamation point ke saath.
lab.e11prepositionsconjunctions_select_t: Sentence mukammal karne ke liye sahi word chunein:
lab.e11sentencestructure_sentences_are_c: Sentences ko unke purpose ke mutabiq categorize kiya jata hai. Sentence types ko samajhna clearer communication aur varied sentence structure ki ijazat deta hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_makes_a_stateme: Statement karta hai ya fact batata hai. Period se khatam hota hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_example_the_sun: Misaal: "The sun rises in the east."
lab.e11sentencestructure_asks_a_question: Sawal poochta hai. Question mark se khatam hota hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_expresses_stron: Strong emotion ya surprise ko zahir karta hai. Exclamation mark se khatam hota hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_gives_a_command: Hukm deta hai ya request karta hai. Aksar subject 'you' maani jaati hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_expresses_a_wis: Khawahish, dua, bad-dua ya tamanna zahir karta hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_is_a_word_phras: ek word, phrase ya clause hai جو sentence mein kisi doosre word ko describe ya limit karta hai. Sentence ko clear aur logical rakhne ke liye, modifier ko us word ke jitna ho sake utna kareeb hona chahiye jiski yeh description karta hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_occurs_when_the: Tab hota hai jab modifier us word se alag ho jata hai jiski yeh description karta hai, confusion ya unintended humor paida karta hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_wrong_he_served: Ghalat: He served sandwiches to the children on paper plates.
lab.e11sentencestructure_correct_he_serv: Sahi: He served sandwiches on paper plates to the children.
lab.e11sentencestructure_occurs_when_the: Tab hota hai jab jis word ko modifier describe karna hai woh sentence mein mojood hi nahi hai. Dangling modifiers aksar sentence ke shuru mein aate hain.
lab.e11sentencestructure_wrong_hoping_to: Ghalat: Hoping to excuse the absence, the note was written and signed by the student.
lab.e11sentencestructure_correct_hoping_: Sahi: Hoping to excuse the absence, the student wrote and signed the note.
lab.e11sentencestructure_to_fix_a_dangli: Dangling modifier theek karne ke liye, aap ko aam taur par main clause ko dobara likhna padta hai taake us mein woh subject shamil ho jo modifier mein bataye gaye action ko perform kar raha hai.
lab.e11sentencestructure_identify_declar: Declarative, Interrogative, Exclamatory, Imperative aur Optative sentences ki pehchaan karein.
lab.e11sentencestructure_rewrite_sentenc: Dangling ya misplaced descriptive phrases theek karne ke liye sentences dobara likhein.
lab.e11sentencestructure_type_your_corre: Apna theek kiya hua sentence yahan likhein...
lab.e11tensesverbals_mastering_tenses_an: Tenses aur verbals mein maharat haasil karne se yakeen hota hai ke aap ka narrative timeline consistent aur logical rahe. Yeh hai is lab mein cover kiye gaye concepts ka breakdown.
lab.e11tensesverbals_when_narrating_even: Jab past mein events bayan kiye jayein, to actions ke sequence ko distinguish karna zaroori hai.
lab.e11tensesverbals_used_for_an_action_: Us action ke liye jo past mein mukammal taur par khatam ho chuka tha.
lab.e11tensesverbals_emphasizes_the_ongo: Us action ki ongoing nature par zor deta hai jo
lab.e11tensesverbals_another_action_in_t: past mein kisi doosre action ke hua.
lab.e11tensesverbals_for_hours_by_the_ti: for hours by the time the team arrived."
lab.e11tensesverbals_tense_describes_act: tense un actions ko describe karta hai jo abhi ho rahe hain ya present moment ke aas paas. Yeh "to be" + present participle (-ing) se banta hai.
lab.e11tensesverbals_that_functions_enti: par khatam hota hai aur noun ki tarah kaam karta hai.
lab.e11tensesverbals_a_gerund_can_act_as: Gerund sentence ke main subject ki tarah act kar sakta hai.
lab.e11tensesverbals_gerunds_must_be_use: Gerunds ka istemal prepositions ya phrasal verbs ke baad karna hota hai jo preposition par khatam ho.
lab.e11tensesverbals_note_to_is_a_prepos: (Note: "to" yahan preposition hai, infinitive marker nahi.)
lab.e11tensesverbals_tense_describes_an_: tense us action ko describe karta hai jo future mein kisi specific time par progress mein hoga. Yeh is tarah banta hai:
lab.e11tensesverbals_fix_the_tense_incon: Neeche di gayi story mein tense inconsistencies theek karein aur sahi verbal forms select karein.
lab.e11tensesverbals_as_you_correct_the_: Jaisa aap tenses theek karte hain, events timeline par apni sahi jagah par aa jayenge.
lab.e11verbsmodals_verbs_describe_an_act: Verbs action, state ya occurrence ko describe karte hain. Yeh sentence ke predicate ka main hissa hote hain.
lab.e11verbsmodals_express_physical_or_m: physical ya mental actions ko zahir karte hain (maslan run, think, jump).
lab.e11verbsmodals_connect_the_subject_t: subject ko complement se jorte hain jo ise describe kare (maslan is, seems, tastes).
lab.e11verbsmodals_require_a_direct_obje: apna meaning complete karne ke liye direct object chahte hain.
lab.e11verbsmodals_example_she_wrote_a_l: Misaal: She wrote a letter. (Object: a letter)
lab.e11verbsmodals_change_their_form_acc: tense, person aur number ke mutabiq apni form badalte hain.
lab.e11verbsmodals_example_i_want_to_wal: Misaal: I want to walk. He wants to walk.
lab.e11verbsmodals_form_their_past_tense: apni past tense '-ed' ya '-d' jodkar banate hain.
lab.e11verbsmodals_have_unique_past_tens: unique past tense forms hote hain jo regular rule ko follow nahi karte.
lab.e11verbsmodals_modal_verbs_are_helpi: Modal verbs helping verbs hain jo necessity, possibility, permission ya ability ko zahir karte hain. Yeh kabhi akela istemal nahi hote aur hamesha verb ki base form ke saath aate hain.
lab.e11verbsmodals_expresses_strong_obli: Strong obligation ya clear evidence par logical deduction ko zahir karta hai.
lab.e11verbsmodals_expresses_possibility: Possibility zahir karta hai ya formal permission maangne ke liye istemal hota hai.
lab.e11verbsmodals_used_for_giving_advic: Nasihat, recommendation ya expectation zahir karne ke liye istemal hota hai.
lab.e11verbsmodals_expresses_ability_pos: Ability, possibility ya polite requests ke liye istemal hota hai.
lab.e11verbsmodals_used_for_future_inten: Future intentions, conditionals ya polite offers ke liye istemal hota hai.
lab.e11verbsmodals_example_i_will_go_to_: Misaal: I will go to the store.
